11.reason: [Using i++ inside array index causes undefined behavior and skips elements incorrectly. Should use p[i] = p[i+1] without modifying i in the expression.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Using i++ inside array index causes undefined behavior and skips elements incorrectly. Should use p[i] = p[i+1] without modifying i in the expression.]

12.reason: [Same issue: i is incremented twice per loop iteration due to i++ in assignment and loop increment, leading to incorrect copying and potential out-of-bounds access.]
